items.name: MIRIX
items.description: Mirix is a multi-agent personal assistant designed to track on-screen activities and answer user questions intelligently. By capturing real-time visual data and consolidating it into structured memories, Mirix transforms raw inputs into a rich knowledge base that adapts to your digital experiences.
